title: albizia amara
intro: Albizia amara, also known as Albizzia or Siris, is a small tree or shrub native to tropical regions of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains a compound called siricarpin, a natural anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Albizia amara include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Albizia amara can be prepared as a decoction or an infusion, and is often used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various ailments.
